prompt: Close-up view of a single human hair magnified, highlighting scales and texture.
prompt_refined: Photorealistic, extreme close-up of a single human hair, highly magnified to clearly show its intricate, overlapping cuticle scales and distinct surface texture in sharp detail. The hair should be centrally positioned against a clean, out-of-focus background.
objects: highly magnified view of the human hair
intricate, overlapping cuticle scales on the hair
distinct surface texture on the hair
